coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 3-group, 45-node closure.
validation: Six Blender/VM cases cover both diameters, head height, shaft depth, and hull resolution. Every case has exact Blender topology and local bounds. A strict double-precision tapered hull retains the tiny authored Z offsets and Blender's cap/triangle/quad grouping.

material.name: Filament PLA .02 mm layer height
material.contract: constant POINT col + Generated Z-band Wave + derivative Bump + Backfacing branch
material.residual: Blender's contrast look clips the bright surface closer to white; Three.js retains more bump detail.
